title: Jade Trades
description: A Jade addon that shows villager trades and marks bed/work POIs and more info with a toggle keybind.
body: Jade Trades is a NeoForge 1.21.1 addon for Jade. It adds villager trade information to the HUD overlay and provides a toggle-style keybind for marking villager bed and work POIs in the world. The marker can stay active on specific villagers, and pressing the key while looking at a non-villager clears the marks. The mod is intended as a practical debug and utility tool for players who work with villagers frequently.![Village Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a239890cadc4be0b70876f25a52d78469ded6f7.png)![workstation location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60859338f7d34cb16b338142c064162cd8e71e43.png)
